summary: Independent QA review of fixed commit 47d413198897466420afff587a7ef903479e94cb found the diff is confined to allowed paths and core player/debug separation is mostly in place, but the task acceptance criterion that all player-visible app-shell strings use the accepted i18n foundation is not fully met. Default player mode still exposes hard-coded English accessibility strings for map keyboard help, selected-district live text, map role description, map renderer error, virtualized district rows, map-mode button labels, and sort button labels. Existing web/UI/e2e tests pass, which confirms the current test matrix does not fail on this implementation defect.

tests_run.result: On feat/m7-app-shell-quality; local HEAD is f1cfa8c5 and ahead of origin by one process-route commit; working tree clean.
47d41319 feat(ui): productize M7 player app shell; 9 files changed, 1271 insertions, 402 deletions.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for task, writer handoff, and route file
tests_run.result: Parsed M7 task JSON, writer handoff JSON, and writer-to-QA route JSON.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only 9bd14c6d..47d413198897466420afff587a7ef903479e94cb | node -e allowed/forbidden path guard
tests_run.result: 15 changed paths checked; notAllowed=[] and forbiddenHits=[].

tests_run.command: rg -n 'Virtualized district rows|Sort by |map mode|Use arrow keys|Selected map district|keyboard navigable map read model|Map renderer failed|Developer milestone workspaces' packages/ui/src/index.tsx apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.tsx tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts
tests_run.result: Found hard-coded English player/default accessibility strings in packages/ui/src/index.tsx and apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.tsx; tests assert the English names instead of zh-CN/system fallback.
Vitest web shell suite passed: 1 file, 8 tests.
Vitest UI suite passed: 1 file, 15 tests.
Electron security preferences passed; preload exposes only monsoonDesktop bridge; renderer file navigation restricted; allowed IPC channels are desktop:getRuntimeInfo and desktop:setFullscreen.

decisions.decision: Do not accept this task until default player-mode accessibility strings are routed through packages/ui/src/i18n.ts and regression coverage fails on hard-coded English under zh-CN/system fallback.
No separate security_reviewer blocker is raised in this QA pass because the fixed implementation commit does not modify desktop/platform IPC files and pnpm desktop:security-check passed.

risks.summary: Current Storybook/Playwright/Vitest coverage can pass while default player-mode accessibility labels remain English-only, so the i18n acceptance criterion is not adequately guarded.
The web shell is consumed by Electron and reads the existing runtime locale bridge, but this review found no new Electron IPC surface and security-check passed.

requested_action: Localize all default player-mode app-shell accessibility and error strings through the accepted i18n foundation, including packages/ui/src/index.tsx MapModeButton aria labels, SortButton aria labels, virtualized row aria label, developer-workspace label if kept visible to assistive tech only in debug, and apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.tsx map keyboard help, selected-district live text, aria-roledescription, and map renderer error. Add focused tests that assert zh-CN/system fallback accessible names are localized and that the English hard-coded labels no longer satisfy the zh-CN path.
